$comment: Known deviations between EYE (via n3reasoner) and the reference results of the W3C N3 reasoning test suite. Every entry maps a test id from w3c-n3-tests/manifest-reasoner.ttl to the reason it is skipped. Remove an entry once the deviation is resolved; the test then runs again in CI. Counts at the time of writing: 50/89 manifest entries pass, 39 skipped.

skip.cwm_includes_conclusion_simple: log:conclusion spawns a sub-reasoner, which needs shell/2 / exec — not available in the WASM build (see eye-js#873 and eyereasoner/eye#177)
skip.cwm_includes_conclusion: test loads a second file (cwm_other/daml-ex.n3) via log:semantics; n3reasoner only exposes the single input document to the reasoner FS
skip.cwm_includes_t10: test dereferences a sibling file (t10a.n3) via log:semantics; n3reasoner only exposes the single input document to the reasoner FS
skip.cwm_includes_t11: test dereferences a sibling file (foo.n3) via log:semantics; n3reasoner only exposes the single input document to the reasoner FS
skip.cwm_includes_t6: reference result file does not declare the prefixes it uses, so it cannot be parsed standalone
skip.cwm_includes_t8: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got literal)
skip.cwm_includes_builtins: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference for this combination of log builtins
skip.cwm_includes_t9br: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (log:includes over nested formulae)
skip.cwm_includes_quantifiers_limited: EYE handles the explicit quantifiers in this test differently than the cwm reference
skip.cwm_includes_xsd: uses test:strings (log:outputString concatenated plain-text output), which is not exposed through the n3reasoner API
skip.log_content: log:content on a datatyped literal raises type_error(atom, ...) in sub_atom/5 in the WASM build
skip.log_parsedAsN3: EYE derives a different graph than the reference for log:parsedAsN3
skip.math_absoluteValue: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_big: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (big number arithmetic)
skip.math_ceiling: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_combo: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got .)
skip.math_difference: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_exponentiation: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_floor: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_inf: EYE raises zero_division for math:quotient on [0.0 0.0] instead of deriving INF like the reference
skip.math_product: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_quotient: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_remainder: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_rounded: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_strings: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (numeric/string conversion)
skip.math_sum: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (literal datatype handling)
skip.math_trig: EYE misses some numeric edge cases of the reference (trigonometry edge cases)
skip.cwm_list_bug2: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got .)
skip.cwm_list_r1: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got .)
skip.cwm_list_unify5: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (list unification)
skip.cwm_reason_t6: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference
skip.string_concatenation: EYE derives a different graph than the reference for string:concatenation
skip.string_format: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got .)
skip.cwm_string_roughly: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (string:containsRoughly)
skip.cwm_string_uriEncode: reference result is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got literal)
skip.cwm_supports_simple: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (log:supports)
skip.cwm_time_t1: EYE output for this test is not parseable by the n3.js parser (Expected entity but got literal)
skip.cwm_unify_unify1: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (formula unification)
skip.cwm_unify_unify2: EYE derives a different graph than the cwm reference (formula unification)
